scripts.render: mkdir -p out/fifa-ranking-race && remotion render src/index.ts QuadrillionShort out/fifa-ranking-race/quadrillion-short.mp4
scripts.poster: mkdir -p out/fifa-ranking-race && remotion still src/index.ts QuadrillionShort out/fifa-ranking-race/poster.png --frame=540
scripts.render:race: mkdir -p out/fifa-ranking-race && remotion render src/index.ts QuadrillionShort out/fifa-ranking-race/ranking-race.mp4
scripts.poster:race: mkdir -p out/fifa-ranking-race && remotion still src/index.ts QuadrillionShort out/fifa-ranking-race/ranking-race.png --frame=540
scripts.render:bitcoin: mkdir -p out/bitcoin-history && remotion render src/index.ts BitcoinHistory out/bitcoin-history/bitcoin-history.mp4 --codec=h264 --crf=12 --x264-preset=slow --pixel-format=yuv420p
scripts.render:bitcoin:4k: mkdir -p out/bitcoin-history && remotion render src/index.ts BitcoinHistory out/bitcoin-history/bitcoin-history-4k.mp4 --codec=h264 --crf=14 --x264-preset=slow --pixel-format=yuv420p --scale=2
scripts.poster:bitcoin: mkdir -p out/bitcoin-history && remotion still src/index.ts BitcoinHistory out/bitcoin-history/bitcoin-history.png --frame=922
scripts.render:nasdaq: mkdir -p out/nasdaq-history && remotion render src/index.ts NasdaqHistory out/nasdaq-history/nasdaq-history.mp4 --codec=h264 --crf=12 --x264-preset=slow --pixel-format=yuv420p
scripts.poster:nasdaq: mkdir -p out/nasdaq-history && remotion still src/index.ts NasdaqHistory out/nasdaq-history/nasdaq-history.png --frame=1317
